pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 23 and export_result.sh line 11 both set PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/s3-project"
setup_task.sh line 40 defines BUCKET_NAME='company-assets', used throughout export_result.sh (lines 71, 105) and app.py (lines 40, 56, 79)

Task requires agent to add MinIO to docker-compose.yml. setup_task.sh creates 'web' service (line 112). export_result.sh expects web service (line 26) and detects minio service (line 33: docker compose ps --services | grep -E "minio|s3")
export_result.sh line 21 creates TEST_FILENAME="test_verify_$(date +%s).txt", which generates names like test_verify_1710000000.txt. No reference to 'verification_test.txt' exists in any script.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Docker Compose setup task involving a Flask application configured with boto3 to interact with MinIO S3 storage. The project directory is /home/ga/s3-project. The bucket name is 'company-assets'. Expected services after completion are 'web' and 'minio'. The Flask application uses flask==3.0.0 and boto3==1.34.0 with Python 3.9-slim as the base image. All test data is synthetically generated within the task setup scripts. The test file naming convention uses dynamic timestamps (test_verify_<unix-timestamp>.txt) rather than a static name.
